summary: Positive show with a standout The Other One jam and a Spill‑The‑Wine‑style stomp; recording quality not mentioned.
review: Reviewers rave about the improvisational energy, highlighting an almost perfect Phil bass jam within The Other One and a quirky "Spillo" Stomp that reminds them of Spill The Wine. No comments were made about the source or clarity of the audio, so the technical side remains unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are 4–5 stars and focus on strong musical moments; lack of recording‑quality feedback keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviews do not discuss the audio source, clarity, or mix, so recording quality cannot be assessed.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Limited commentary, but reviewers emphasize improvisational jams and a notable tease within The Other One, suggesting an engaging middle‑section of the show.

band_member_comments.Phil: Praised for an almost perfect solo bass jam (the "Philo jam").
